device_role_registry.notes: 3 known nodes seeded (VPS=control_plane, Beast=heavy_workstation, Cockpit=cockpit_ui). JSONL persistence. No instance leaks.

runtime_fleet.notes: 11 RuntimeProvider values. Fleet member model with cost_model, risk, capabilities. JSONL persistence.

workload_placement_policy.notes: 19 WorkloadType values. Preference maps route heavy/browser/media to Beast. Medium risk requires approval. Degraded fallback works.

jarvis_readiness_gate.notes: Uses runtime fleet detection. Cloud API exhaustion is warning only. standard_ready requires capable_runtime AND no blocking issues.

jarvis_acceptance_mode.notes: standard_multi_runtime mode when capable runtime exists. deterministic_only as degraded fallback. blocked when no runtime and no operator acceptance.

jarvis_acceptance.notes: Run + Artifact tracking. JSONL append-only persistence.

jarvis_acceptance_scenarios.notes: 4 scenarios (A-D). No production mutation. No external write.

canonical_types_diff.notes: 5 new types registered: RuntimeProvider, RuntimeCostModel, RuntimeReadiness, RuntimeFleetMember, RuntimeSelection

organism_bridge_diff.notes: 4 new handlers added to _ACTIONS dict. All use lazy imports. All have try/except with logging.

organism_routes_diff.notes: 4 new GET routes under /operational-truth/. ALL have operatorGuard middleware.
